---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a data quality issue or broken query
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Query affected:**
Link to the Dune query (e.g., https://dune.com/queries/1234567)

**File in repo:**
Path to the SQL file (e.g., `balancer/volume/daily_volume_1234567.sql`)

**Describe the bug:**
What is incorrect? (e.g., miscalculation, missing data, wrong join)

**Expected behavior:**
What should the correct result look like?

**Additional context:**
Screenshots, sample data, or links to related queries/dashboards.
